promoted_delegate_artifacts.relied_claim: Compare complete upper-triangle adjacency fingerprints across the two custom graph6 parsers and NetworkX; edge and degree signatures are not sufficient parser evidence.
promoted_delegate_artifacts.audit_result: Accepted as a verifier-hardening requirement and independently implemented and tested by the Sol principal.

rejected_or_unrelied_advice.reason: Its source-gate recommendation matched the pre-existing durable strategy and was audited directly from maintained sources; no claim depended on the memo artifact.
